title: Lost Rays 6
description: A dynamic, high-energy shader effect dominated by vibrant magenta and pink tones radiating from the upper-right and left portions of the frame. The composition features god rays emanating from a light source positioned at coordinates (0.2, 0.15), creating dramatic streaks of luminous pink (#f72585) that sweep diagonally across the dark background. A zoom blur effect centered at (0.85, 0.25) with intensity 48 creates a sense of rapid motion and convergence toward the upper-right, producing elongated streaks and a tunnel-like perspective. The background is a deep, near-black purple (#0d0221) that provides stark contrast. Fine vertical line patterns and film grain texture (strength 0.15) overlay the entire composition, adding a subtle noise and cinematic quality. The tritone color mapping blends between dark purple, hot pink, and violet (#b5179e), creating smooth color transitions across the mid-tones. The overall atmosphere is intense, futuristic, and kinetic, with a strong sense of directional energy flowing from left to right and upward. The lighting creates dramatic shadows and highlights that suggest three-dimensional depth despite the abstract nature of the effect.
